creator: jkh@FreeBSD.org
text:
> 	The rxvt port in x11 category is obselet, the latest version
> 	is 2.4.5

Hmmmm.  The port is fine, but this version of rxvt also fails on my
system, it seems.  You say you're running the January 10th kernel of
2.2.5 - is it possible for you to update to this month's 2.2.5-stable
and try this again?  There's already one PR in the database reporting
this and I can confirm that it happens on my 2.2.5-stable system
as well: see http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=5937
It would be useful to know if you can also reproduce the problem.
Thanks!

					Jordan
